productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Formal Leather Shoe
description: Look stylish with these black leather shoes in a classic design from red tape. These shoes in a sneaker design are created for comfort and will look great when teamed with jeans and tees for a casual look.Upper High quality leather uppers with distressed look for protection, comfort and durability Leather panel overlays for extra style Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Textile lining for greater comfort Brand name embroidered on the side Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole elevated pivot point design for better grip, 180 degree movement and durability shoe careUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny
